title: Workday Advanced Compensation Solution Architect|Contract
description:
Overview

We are seeking an experienced Workday specialist to join our Business & Technology Integration team for a major HCM Implementation project. Our client, a leading financial services organization, is modernizing HR to enhance efficiency, scalability, and employee experience.

Role

As the Solution Architect & Functional Lead, you will design end-to-end Workday solutions, lead requirements gathering, shape future-state processes, and ensure alignment with strategic objectives. Acting as a SME in Core HCM and Advanced Compensation, you will provide leadership, functional guidance, and decision-making support across the project team.
Key Responsibilities

  • Solution Design: Define requirements, lead design discussions, and architect scalable Workday solutions.
  • Leadership: Guide cross-functional teams through design, configuration, testing, and deployment.
  • Collaboration: Partner with stakeholders and technical teams to ensure seamless integration.
  • Advisory: Recommend strategies to improve efficiency, user experience, and operational effectiveness.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science or any equivalent
  • Around 3 years’ experience in Workday Core HCM and Advanced Compensation (Solution Architect-level)
  • Excellent knowledge of end-to-end HR processes in complex organizations.
  • Proven ability to lead teams, influence stakeholders, and drive consensus.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills with a focus on scalable, future-ready solutions.

Thank you for your interest!

We respect your privacy and all communication will be treated with confidentiality. If you wish to know more about this position or explore other roles, please prepare your updated profile and get in touch with our consultant at  cristina.malijan@manpower.com.sg

Cristina Malabuyoc Malijan EA License No. 02C3423 Personnel Registration No. R1111547

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by ManpowerGroup Singapore for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012. To learn more about ManpowerGroup's Global Privacy Policy, please visit https://www.manpower.com.sg/privacy-policy

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
